## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 lines.

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows semantic convention (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
- [ ] Source branch name follows `type/description` (example: `fix/login-error-message`)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes locally
- [ ] UX impact has been tested on mobile if UI changed
- [ ] Screenshots or short video added for UI changes
